findings.evidence: per-req-judgement.json omitted the required axes object with implementability, evidence_strength, dependency_health, ac_verifiability, scope_fit, and product_fit scores.
findings.fix_recommendation: Regenerate per-REQ judgements using the Phase 2 schema and recompute final score from the axis weights.

findings.evidence: Evidence arrays contained only requirement IDs and no code path:line evidence.
findings.fix_recommendation: Add concrete code path:line evidence or label weak evidence explicitly.
